ItacPersonItem.Notes: Proposed as Linceo by Carlo Muti, in 1621. He was also known as Rustico, and Academico Aldeano. He studied in Florence and Siena, and in Rome he was at the service of Cardinal Tiberio Muti. In Venice, he was the servant of Cardinal Domenico Molin. He was famous for his Latin and Italian poems.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
